message:
feat(web): Complete PWA support with install prompt and offline banner

Add missing PWA integration:
- Integrate OfflineBanner component into Providers
- Create usePWAInstall hook for install prompt management
- Create InstallPrompt component with iOS-specific instructions
- Add both components to global Providers

The PWA infrastructure was already in place (manifest.json, sw.js,
useServiceWorker hook, offline-banner component) but wasn't fully
integrated. This commit completes the integration.

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-2hhc

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
